story.text:
# 🔷 V41 — Chronicle Vertex
**vertex** · shared · knowledge

Memora's seat. Protection+Memory+Value (stratum 3). The shielded memo: protect the value, remember the note. The chain remembers; you decide who else gets to. Source: Cloaking Guide.
